heading: Definitions
label: 1637a Definitions
notes: Amendments2002—Par. (1). inserted hyphen after “means”, designated remainder of existing provisions as subpar. (A), substituted “; and” for period at end, and added subpar. (B).Pub. L. 107–171
amendments: Amendments2002—Par. (1). inserted hyphen after “means”, designated remainder of existing provisions as subpar. (A), substituted “; and” for period at end, and added subpar. (B).Pub. L. 107–171

children.label: A
children.text: manufactured dairy products that are used by the Secretary to establish minimum prices for Class III and Class IV milk under a Federal milk marketing order issued under ; andsection 608c of this title

children.label: B
children.text: substantially identical products designated by the Secretary.

children.heading: Manufacturer
children.label: 2 Manufacturer
children.text: The term “manufacturer” means any person engaged in the business of buying milk in commerce for the purpose of manufacturing dairy products.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
